FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Breakout Above Weekly High Confirms Bullish Momentum as Treasury Yields Support Dollar
tldr_points: USD/JPY clears last week's high at 159.33, establishing bullish breakout structure
MA20 at 158.13 provides dynamic support; treasury auction yields reinforce dollar strength
Geopolitical risk premium in Middle East adds bid to safe-haven yen crosses
FX.excerpt: Bullish breakout confirmed above 159.33 with MA20 support intact; treasury yields provide fundamental catalyst
FX.comment: Breakout above weekly high with MA20 support intact; treasury yields provide fundamental catalyst

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Geopolitical De-escalation and Semi-Conductor Momentum Support Bullish Trend
tldr_points: Geopolitical tensions easing on Iran peace hopes provides a tailwind for risk appetite.
Semiconductor sector strength, exemplified by Micron's valuation milestone, drives index momentum.
Price action remains significantly above the 20-day Moving Average, indicating a strong bullish trend.
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 maintains bullish trajectory as geopolitical risks subside and semiconductor growth catalysts emerge.
STOCKS.comment: Bullish trend confirmed by price distance above MA20 and easing geopolitical risks.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: AI Detects Weakness Below MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Cautious
tldr_points: Price sits below MA20 indicating near‑term bearish bias.
Regulatory headwinds from UK sanctions and Spain’s prediction‑market crackdown weigh on sentiment.
Technical setup favors a short toward 74k with tight stop above 77.5k.
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD slips below MA20 amid mixed crypto regulation news, bearish technicals favor short toward 74k with tight stops.!
CRYPTO.comment: Price below MA20 with bearish order flow and regulatory headwinds favor a short toward 74k.
